name: Texas Chili & Biscuits
recipeIngredient: Ground chicken breast, skinless (1 lb), cooked
Skim milk, at room temperature (2/3 cup)
Low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. To prepare the filling, heat olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add chicken, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in chili seasoning mix, corn, crushed tomatoes, and water.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
7. Pour the chicken mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Meanwhile, to prepare the biscuit mixture, combine baking mix, cornmeal, and milk in a mixing bowl.
9. Spoon biscuit dough in mounds around the edge of the casserole.
10. Bake, uncovered, for 15 minutes or until biscuits are light brown.
11. Top with Monterey Jack cheese.
12. Bake, uncovered again, for 3 more minutes or until cheese has melted.
